creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
After update to 2.3, rspamd fails to build with poudriere. Tried both on bare metal and in a VM running on a different machine, both running 12.1-RELEASE-p2 on AMD64.

Errors encountered during build:
ld.lld: error: src/librspamd-server.so: undefined reference to FIPS_mode
ld.lld: error: src/librspamd-server.so: undefined reference to FIPS_mode_set

See log for more details.
